title: Crabs Backport
description: A 1.20.1 backport mod for various features from 1.21-1.21.6
body:
# Crabs Backport
**Crabs backport is a  mod that adds various features from 1.21-1.21.6. I'm addind features in no particular order, and im also not adding every single feature, just the ones i feel like good for building or QOL.**

***Don't bother with suggestions at the github, I will most likely not be bothered enough***

## Features
### New Blocks
- Bush
- Cactus Flower
- Short/Long Dry Grass
- Firefly Bush
- Chiseled Copper
- Copper Door
- Copper Grate
- Copper Trapdoor
- Copper Bulbs
- Tuff Bricks / Stairs / Slab / Wall
- Chiseled Tuff
- Chiseled Tuff Bricks
- Tuff Stairs / Slab / Wall
- Polished Tuff Stairs / Slabs / Wall
- Meditative, Prairie Ride, Baroque, Humble, Unpacked, Bouquet, Cavebird, Cotán, Endboss, Fern, Owlemons, Sunflowers, Tides, Backyard, Pond, Changing, Finding, Lowmist, Passage, and Orb paintings
- Creator, Creator (Music Box), Precipe, Tears and Lava Chicken music discs
- Shelves for all wood variants
### General Changes
- Made most of the natural blocks generate in the world (exept leaf litter)
- Made the beacon render bigger from farther away
- Changed the wandering trader
- Changed the clouds' texture
### Planned changes
- Pale Oak
- Copper Golem
- The current music playing toast

**ALL CREDIT FOR TEXTURES, SOUNDS AND MOST CODE GOES TO MOJANG, I AM NOT IN ANY WAY AFFILIATED WITH MOJANG**
